articles.title: Delhi Power Cut Today: BRPL Announces Scheduled Outages on June 29, Check Areas, Timings
articles.description: On June 29, several regions in South and West Delhi will experience scheduled power outages due to maintenance by BSES Rajdhani Power Limited.

articles.title: Roads in Venezuela's La Guaira State 90% Restored After Earthquakes: Acting President
articles.description: Roads in Venezuela's La Guaira State, which was hardest hit by the earthquakes, have been approximately 90% restored, while the water supply has been restored to 68%, Acting Venezuelan President Delcy Rodriguez said.

articles.title: Vir Das defends Kangana Ranaut over 'Revolver Rani' kissing rumour
articles.description: Vir Das denied rumours of being injured by Kangana Ranaut during a kissing scene in 'Revolver Rani'. He called the story 'pure fiction' and Kangana a 'complete professional'. Kangana also reacted, dismissing the viral claim on social media.

articles.title: Suryakumar Yadav celebrates 2nd anniversary of India's T20 WC win
articles.description: Suryakumar Yadav posted a heartwarming message on the second anniversary of India's T20 World Cup 2024 victory. He thanked fans for their support during the campaign, which saw India defeat South Africa in the final to end an 11-year ICC trophy drought.

articles.title: Bengaluru Techie's Rs 71,000 Monthly Spending, Including Weekend Trips, Goes Viral, Internet Reacts: ‘I’m Poor’
articles.description: A Bengaluru tech professional's viral Reddit post detailed a Rs 71,000 monthly budget, with Rs 20,000 allocated to weekend trips, sparking a social media debate. Users debated whether this reflected a comfortable lifestyle or lifestyle inflation. While some found the spending excessive, others defended it as a personal choice based on priorities.

articles.title: Shiv Sena warns Kharge over RSS remarks, 'happiness won't last long'
articles.description: Shiv Sena's Karnataka President Andola Siddalinga Swami criticized Home Minister Priyank Kharge for his remarks on the RSS, saying his 'happiness will not last long' and calling on him to respond to a Bengaluru court summons issued over his comments.

articles.title: Dharmendra Pradhan witnesses Snana Yatra at Puri's Jagannath Temple
articles.description: Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan offered prayers at Puri's Jagannath Temple during the 'Snana Yatra'. The festival involves the ceremonial bathing of the deities with 108 pots of water before the annual Rath Yatra.

articles.title: Adani case: US court seeks DOJ clarification on dropping charges
articles.description: A US court has sought clarification from the Department of Justice on its motion to drop charges against Gautam and Sagar Adani. US lawyer Adam Goldberg says this is a routine procedure and the judge is likely to approve the DOJ's request.

articles.title: Kirtland Air Force Base Alert: Shelter-In-Place Ordered After Bomb Threat
articles.description: A reported bomb threat triggered an emergency response at Kirtland Air Force Base in Albuquerque, New Mexico, prompting a temporary shelter-in-place order across the installation.

articles.title: Vinicius Jr.'s emotional World Cup moment leaves fans stunned after grandmother's heartfelt surprise
articles.description: ​Vinicius Jr. has become one of Brazil’s brightest stars at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, but his latest headlines haven’t been about goals or records. The Real Madrid striker was struck with emotion when he received an unexpected message from the woman who helped shape his life from childhood ahead of Brazil's quarterfinal game against Japan.

Yash Raj Films makes first bet on vertical entertainment with Rusk Media investment
articles.description: Yash Raj Films is venturing into the burgeoning digital-first entertainment space with a strategic investment in Rusk Media. This move signals YRF's expansion into mobile-first storytelling, focusing on original animation and vertical micro-dramas. The partnership aims to create category-defining intellectual property for global digital platforms, leveraging India's massive mobile audience and establishing the country as a creative force in vertical entertainment.

articles.title: Big Bear eaglet Sandy survived a terrifying fall, but the real threat begins after its first flight
articles.description: Big Bear Lake bald eaglet Sandy experienced an 'accidental fledge' after a fall from its nest, surprisingly taking its first flight to safety. While parents Jackie and Shadow are providing support, wildlife experts warn that the real challenges for young eagles are just beginning. Sibling rivalry, starvation, disease, and predators.

articles.title: Cauliflower brownie recipe: Celebrity trainer Yasmin Karachiwala’s healthy twist on a classic chocolate dessert
articles.description: Celebrity fitness guru Yasmin Karachiwala has unveiled a surprising yet healthy dessert: cauliflower brownies. This innovative recipe swaps traditional flour and butter for steamed cauliflower, creating a moist and rich chocolate treat. Karachiwala explains that the dark chocolate masks the vegetable, while the cauliflower ensures a tender texture. A touch of maple syrup can be added for extra sweetness, offering a guilt-free indulgence.

articles.title: Psychology says people who shop at thrift stores despite having money aren't just saving cash, they may value sustainability and individuality
articles.description: Forget the notion that thrift stores are only for the budget-conscious. Today, a growing number of shoppers, even those who can afford new, are embracing secondhand fashion. This shift is driven by a desire for unique style, environmental consciousness, and the thrill of discovery. Research highlights that understanding the ecological impact of new clothing significantly boosts positive attitudes towards pre-loved items, making it a conscious choice for many.

articles.title: Sohail Khan fears early exit from ‘Alliance’: ‘I don’t know how to lie or manipulate’
articles.description: Filmmaker Sohail Khan is gearing up to participate in Kunal Kemmu's reality show, 'Alliance.' He has voiced concerns about his ability to handle the strategic twists of the game, worrying that his candid nature might cut his time short in the competition. However, he appreciates the show’s emphasis on relationships and trust rather than just winning tasks. He promises to stay authentic amid the ever-changing dynamics of the game.
